$comment: schema_version=1.0.0 | Added 2026-06-03 | Scheduler Layer. Format for scheduler/queue.json. Never edited manually.
title: NOVA 2.5 Scheduler Queue
description: Output of scheduler.mjs. Scored, ordered list of tasks that can be assigned to agents. Each entry includes score component breakdown (explainability) and a ranked candidate list. Snapshot-bound: tied to a specific registry event count and event head hash.

scheduler_sequence.description: Monotonically increasing run counter. Incremented on each scheduler.mjs execution.

registry_event_count.description: event_count of the registry.json snapshot used to produce this queue. Links the recommendation to a specific registry state.

event_head_hash.description: event_hash of the HEAD event in TASK_EVENTS.jsonl at the time of this run. Allows consumers to detect if the queue is stale.

registry_snapshot_index.description: Index of the latest SNAPSHOT_CREATED event consumed, if available.

queue.description: Tasks ordered by score descending. Only schedulable states (per scheduler_policy.json) are included.

score.description: Final composite score. Higher = schedule first.

components.description: Fixed-point score factor breakdown. All normalized components are ∈ [0,1]. Canonical integer scores are used for sort/comparison; _display fields are human-readable only.

priority_multiplier.description: Discrete tier multiplier derived from task.priority_weight.

urgency_norm.description: Event-distance based urgency: min(1, (head_idx - last_event_idx) / halflife_events).

execution_cost.description: Raw Fibonacci cost value for reference.

within_score_fp.description: floor(1e6 × (W_U×U + W_D×D + W_T×T + W_C×C)) — within-group integer score before priority multiplier.

candidates.description: Agents ranked by fit_score descending. May be empty if no capable agents are registered.

no_candidates_reason.description: Why candidates is empty, if applicable. E.g. 'no_agents_with_IMPLEMENTATION_capability'.
